title: Login issue
description: User is unable to log into the system even after multiple attempts and password reset. The system shows invalid credentials error.

title: Payment failed
description: Customer transaction fails during checkout process even though sufficient balance is available. Card gets declined error repeatedly.

title: UI bug on dashboard
description: Dashboard layout is broken where cards are misaligned and overlapping on smaller screens causing poor user experience.

title: Password reset not working
description: Password reset email is not being received by users even after multiple requests. No email appears in inbox or spam folder.

title: Slow website loading
description: Website pages are taking unusually long time to load due to possible server or API performance issues affecting user experience.

title: Account suspended
description: User account has been suspended mistakenly by the system's automated security check even though there is no violation.

title: Email not sending
description: SMTP configuration failure is preventing system emails from being sent to users including notifications and confirmations.

title: Mobile responsive issue
description: Website layout breaks on mobile devices where elements overlap and text becomes unreadable on small screens.

title: Data not syncing
description: API synchronization between services is failing which results in outdated or missing data across connected systems.

title: Notification delay
description: Push notifications are delayed significantly causing users to receive alerts much later than real-time events.

title: Profile update error
description: Users are unable to update their profile information due to server validation errors during submission.

title: Search not working
description: Search functionality returns empty results even when valid data exists in the database.

title: File upload error
description: Users cannot upload images or documents due to file size validation and server timeout issues.

title: Chat not loading
description: Real-time chat feature fails to load conversations and shows loading spinner indefinitely.

title: Broken link on homepage
description: Footer navigation link redirects to a 404 error page instead of the correct destination.

title: Security alert false positive
description: System incorrectly flags normal user activity as suspicious security threat.

title: Invoice not generated
description: Billing system fails to generate invoice after successful payment confirmation.

title: Dark mode issue
description: Dark mode toggle does not apply theme properly across all UI components.

title: API timeout error
description: API requests frequently timeout causing failure in loading data from backend services.

title: Logout issue
description: Users remain logged in even after clicking logout due to session persistence bug.
